nodes.name: example.toml
nodes.summary: Comprehensive example configuration file for RisingWave listing all supported settings across server, meta, frontend, compute, compactor, and storage sections with documented defaults.

nodes.name: full-with-batch-query-limit.toml
nodes.summary: Single-line configuration that imports the full example config while adding a batch query memory limit override.

nodes.name: hummock-trace.toml
nodes.summary: Minimal configuration enabling Hummock storage trace recording for debugging and performance analysis of the storage layer.

nodes.name: serving-only.toml
nodes.summary: Configuration profile for serving-only compute nodes, disabling streaming execution and enabling batch/serving workload mode.

nodes.name: standalone-example.toml
nodes.summary: Empty placeholder configuration file for the standalone deployment mode; intended to be populated with standalone-specific overrides.
